steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject “The word 'stockade'” is singular. The blank needs a verb matching the form in the parallel clause: “cinch” ... derives from cincho.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires a singular subject to take a singular present-tense verb, and “derives” is the only form that satisfies both requirements. The other three choices violate this rule through plural forms, wrong tense, or both. This matches choice D — D is correct.
